headline: Investor Who Scored 900% Win in 2008 Crisis Has New Big Short Bet
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Hedge fund manager Lee Robinson notched a 900% gain during the global financial crisis by turning a $20 million position into $200 million with timely bets against the US subprime mortgage sector. headline: KKR Expands Aviation Exposure with $1.4 Billion Commitment, Reuters Says
summary: KKR & Co. Inc. (NYSE:KKR) is included among Billionaire Mario Gabelli’s Top 12 Dividend Stocks. On June 18, Reuters reported that KKR & Co. Inc. (NYSE:KKR) disclosed a new $1.4 billion investment in aircraft leasing through its partnership with Altavair. The move comes as ongoing production delays at Airbus and Boeing continue to limit aircraft […]
